description: Audit test vectors for diBoaS /tools suite. Each scenario has explicit input, expectedOutput, and per-field tolerance. Auditor implementations should match expectedOutput within the tolerance. v3 (2026-05-26): FX-16 adoption D1+D8 — EUR `annualDepreciation` 1.23% → 0.55% (D1 field-placement fix per Bar 2026-05-26 decision register); EUR-bearing scenarios regenerated from live engine post-update; PT3' €541,891 supersedes prior PT3 €608,815; 14 new currencies added to `exchangeRates.rates`. Schema bump prevents auditors from comparing new code against stale v2 vectors. v2 (2026-05-23): F6 — assetHistory mode-comparison scenario uses explicit `lumpSumAmount` + `dcaAmount` input fields.

currency.note: Tolerance for FV/FA/balance outputs ≥ $1000; sub-cent precision required for amounts < $100

smallCurrency.note: For monthlyEquivalent and other sub-$100 outputs

veryLargeCurrency.note: 0.01% relative tolerance for FVs ≥ $1B (where absolute $1 is negligible)

months.note: Exact integer match required; sentinel "INF" indicates 1200-month cap exceeded

percentage.note: ±0.01 percentage points; e.g., 7.0001% within tolerance of 7%

integer.note: Exact match (e.g., months count, totalContributed if integer)

PT2.note: SP500 2010 DCA total_return vs price_only delta. Updated 2026-05-23 v1.2 from 18.76 → 18.33 after F1 dedup (Auditor 4 N1). Still within Bar-signed ±2pp envelope.

PT3.note: PT3' Bar-signed re-acceptance 2026-05-26 (FX-16 adoption D1+D2). Retired prior PT3 €608,815 which reflected the now-corrected EUR field-placement error (annualDepreciation was carrying a retrospective endpoint-pair CAGR 1.23% misplaced in the forward field; now carries the locked forward calibration assumption 0.55%).

PA1.note: BRL full-series geometric CAGR Jan 2010 → May 2026 from BCB PTAX OData (192 monthly observations). Tolerance ±0.5%. Auditor 4 rename — was "BRL 16y CAGR", which was ambiguous about endpoint choice.

BTC_RECON.note: Phase A BTC reconciliation. Updated 2026-05-23 from $254,188 → $261,202 after F1 dedup fix (Yahoo partial-trailing-bar duplicates removed; finalPrice now reflects full-month May 2026 close $77,539 not partial $75,427). Jan-2016 start per v1.1 UX spec. Product-owner (Bar) re-ack pending for the updated point estimate; within originally-accepted $200k–$280k research-anchored envelope.
